_publications._publicationTitle: Therapeutic Vulnerability to ATR Inhibition in Concurrent

_contextSnippet: ATRX KO (via CRISPR) resulted in decreased growth in the high-grade glioma cell lines (U251, SF188), with increased apoptosis more evident in U251 in vitro
details: ATRX KO resulted in decreased growth but with less evident apoptosis compared to U251
